panels.description: Current instance count per project across the selected hypervisors (oie_instance_info).
panels.title: Instance Count by Project

panels.description: Total vCPUs allocated per project (sum of vCPU count across all instances on selected hypervisors).

targets.expr:
sum by (project_uuid, project_name) (
  label_replace(
    oie_instance_cpu_vcpu_count{instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor.*", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid",             project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name" },
    "vcpus_num",
    "$1",
    "vcpus",
    "([0-9]+)"
  )
)

panels.title: vCPUs Allocation by Project

panels.description: Total RAM allocated per project in MB (sum of assigned memory across all instances on selected hypervisors).

targets.expr:
sum by (project_uuid, project_name) (
  label_replace(
    oie_instance_mem_allocated_mb{instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor.*", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid",             project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name" },
    "mem_mb_num",
    "$1",
    "mem_mb",
    "([0-9]+)"
  )
)

panels.title: RAM Allocation by Project

panels.description: Project CPU usage as a share of total cluster CPU threads; 100% ≈ 1:1 vCPU-to-physical-thread, may exceed 100% when overcommitted.
panels.title: Project CPU Usage (% of Cluster Capacity)

panels.description: Project CPU usage as a share of that project's allocated vCPUs; 100% = fully saturated project CPU capacity.
panels.title: Project CPU Usage (% of Project Capacity)

panels.description: Total live guest memory used by instances per project (GB), plus total cluster memory capacity for context.
panels.title: Project Live Instance Memory Usage (MB)

panels.description: Project live guest memory usage as a percentage of total cluster memory capacity.
panels.title: Project Live Instance Memory Usage (% of Cluster Capacity)

panels.description: Project live guest memory usage as a percentage of that project's allocated memory.
panels.title: Project Live Instance Memory Usage (% of Project Capacity)

panels.description: Aggregated disk read throughput per project (GB/s) across all instances.
panels.title: Project Disk Read Throughput

panels.description: Aggregated disk write throughput per project (GB/s) across all instances.
panels.title: Project Disk Write Throughput

panels.description: Total disk read volume per project over the selected interval (GB), from oie_instance_disk_read_gbytes_total.
panels.title: Project Disk Read Total

panels.description: Total disk write volume per project over the selected interval (GB), from oie_instance_disk_write_gbytes_total.
panels.title: Project Disk Write Total

panels.description: Aggregated disk read IOPS per project (read requests per second across all instances).

targets.expr: (sum by (project_name, project_uuid) (rate(oie_instance_disk_read_requests_total{instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor.*", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name"}[1m])))

panels.title: Project Disk Read IOPS

panels.description: Aggregated disk write IOPS per project (write requests per second across all instances).

targets.expr: (sum by (project_name, project_uuid) (rate(oie_instance_disk_write_requests_total{instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor.*", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name"}[1m])))

panels.title: Project Disk Write IOPS

panels.description: Aggregated inbound packet rate per project (RX packets per second across all instances).
panels.title: Project Network RX Packets per Second

panels.description: Aggregated outbound packet rate per project (TX packets per second across all instances).
panels.title: Project Network TX Packets per Second

panels.description: Aggregated inbound network throughput per project (Gbps from RX traffic across all instances).
panels.title: Project Network RX Throughput

panels.description: Aggregated outbound network throughput per project (Gbps from TX traffic across all instances).
panels.title: Project Network TX Throughput

panels.description: Top projects by total conntrack flows across all fixed IPs.

targets.expr: sum by (project_uuid, project_name) (oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows{instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor.*", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name"})

panels.title: Project Conntrack Total Flows

panels.description: Average conntrack flows per active project in each project, showing how connection-heavy the workloads are.
panels.title: Project Conntrack Flows per Project

panels.description: Total inbound conntrack flows per project (flows where the project is the destination).

targets.expr: sum by (project_uuid, project_name) (oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows_inbound{instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor.*", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name"})

panels.title: Project Conntrack Inbound Connections

panels.description: Total outbound conntrack flows per project (flows where the project is the source).

targets.expr: sum by (project_uuid, project_name) (oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows_outbound{instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor.*", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name"})

panels.title: Project Conntrack Outbound Connections

panels.description: Project share of total conntrack capacity across selected hypervisors (relative share of oie_host_conntrack_max).
panels.title: Project Conntrack Capacity Share (%)

panels.description: Project share of currently used conntrack entries across the selected hypervisors.
panels.title: Project Conntrack Usage Share (%)

panels.description: Average attention score per project, blending resource pressure and threat activity (0–100). Higher means noisier/more attention-worthy, not automatically broken.
panels.title: Project Attention Score (avg 0–100)

panels.description: Average resource score per project (0–100) from CPU, disk, network, and conntrack pressure. Higher means the project leans harder on shared resources.
panels.title: Project Resource Score (avg 0–100)

panels.description: Average threat score per project (0–100) from threat-intel hits and behavior patterns. Higher means more suspicious/noisy traffic, not automatically an incident.
panels.title: Project Threat Score (avg 0–100)
